portfolio_rationale: AMZN and GOOGL lead on the combination of clean technical sweeps, strong fundamentals, and weak bear cases — AMZN's technical analyst found zero bearish factors while GOOGL has exceptional ROE/ROA with minimal leverage. AAPL earns a meaningful allocation given consistent bullish signals and strong profitability despite the recurring liquidity flag. XOM gets a smaller position as its bull case rests on fewer fundamental pillars despite strong momentum. BRK.B is excluded due to a bearish signal just last week and mixed technicals, and LLY is excluded as the judge rendered a bearish verdict.

AMZN.reason: Cleanest technical picture (all 6 bullish factors, zero bearish) combined with strong fundamentals and a bear case that was factually inconsistent with the data.

GOOGL.reason: Exceptional ROE (36%) and ROA (26%) with very low debt, strong MACD and 20d momentum, and a consistently weak bear case over three weeks.

AAPL.reason: Consistent three-week bullish signal with strong profitability metrics and 22% revenue growth; liquidity concern is manageable given massive free cash flow.

XOM.reason: Strong technical momentum (all 6 bullish factors) and positive news sentiment, though thinner fundamental coverage warrants a smaller position.

BRK.B.reason: Weakest bull conviction in the set with a bearish judge signal just last week, below-50d moving average, and multiple unresolved risk flags.

LLY.reason: Judge rendered a bearish verdict citing elevated leverage, overbought RSI at 81, and credible downside risks that outweigh strong revenue growth.
